subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who hast drawn nigh! Hearken unto that which the Wronged One calleth out to thee from the precincts of the Prison - verily, there is no god [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها العبد المقبل ان استمع ما ینادیک به المظلوم من شطر السجن انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
